home.title: Every paw print matters.
home.subtitle: We connect shelters with people who want to provide a home or support an animal. Find your ideal companion or help from wherever you are.
home.featuredSubtitle: These friends are waiting for you
home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to transform a life
home.step1Desc: Filter by species, size, age, and location. Find the ideal companion.
home.step2Desc: Submit your adoption application or choose to sponsor monthly.
home.step3Desc: Give them a home, follow their progress, and receive shelter updates.
home.campaignsSubtitle: Help those who need it most
home.whyAdoptSubtitle: Adopting transforms lives — the animal's and yours
home.whySaveLivesDesc: Each adoption frees a space in the shelter to rescue another animal.
home.whySafeProcessDesc: Verified shelters, post-adoption follow-up, and veterinary advice.
home.whyCommunityDesc: Join a network of people committed to animal welfare.
home.whyImpactDesc: Your donations and sponsorships generate measurable changes in shelters.

shelterForm.privacyBody: This information is used by the Mi Huella team to verify your shelter and contact you. The public shelter directory shows name, city, and description; other details may appear on your full profile once verified. If you prefer not to share something, leave it blank or update it later in settings.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.generalContent: By accessing and using the Tu Huella platform, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. Tu Huella is a platform that connects animal shelters with people interested in adopting, sponsoring, or donating. Use of the platform implies acceptance of all policies described herein.
terms.userContent: Users commit to providing truthful and up-to-date information in their profiles and applications. The use of the platform for fraudulent, abusive purposes or those that threaten animal welfare is prohibited. Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their access credentials.
terms.adoptionContent: Adoption applications are evaluated by the corresponding shelters. Tu Huella acts as an intermediary facilitating the connection between adopters and shelters, but the final approval decision rests with the shelter. Adopters commit to providing a suitable home and complying with post-adoption follow-up requirements established by the shelter.
terms.donationContent: Donations made through the platform are processed securely through authorized payment providers. Funds raised are directed to the selected shelters and campaigns. Tu Huella does not charge commission on donations. Sponsorships can be canceled at any time by the user.
terms.privacyContent: Tu Huella is committed to protecting the personal information of its users in accordance with applicable data protection laws. Collected data is used exclusively for the operation of the platform and the improvement of our services. We do not share personal information with third parties without the explicit consent of the user, except when required by law.
terms.shelterContent: Registered shelters commit to maintaining up-to-date information about animals available for adoption. They must provide adequate animal care conditions and comply with current regulations. Shelters are responsible for verifying the suitability of adopters and conducting the corresponding post-adoption follow-up.
terms.contentContent: All content published on the platform, including text, images, logos, and design, is the property of Tu Huella or its respective authors. Users who publish content on the platform grant Tu Huella a non-exclusive license for its use within the platform.
terms.liabilityContent: Tu Huella is not responsible for direct agreements between adopters and shelters outside the platform. The platform is provided "as is" without guarantees of continuous availability. Tu Huella is not responsible for the accuracy of information provided by shelters or users.
terms.changesContent: Tu Huella reserves the right to modify these terms and conditions at any time. Changes will be notified to users through the platform. Continued use of the platform after publication of changes constitutes acceptance thereof.
terms.contactContent: For inquiries, suggestions, or complaints related to these terms and conditions, you can contact us through the channels available on the platform.
